hero.title: A year in Belur
hero.subtitle: An annual celebration of our six children and the coordinator who showed up every single day

wins.text: Ishaan kept the session notebook every single day of February — our first Star of the Month.
Gauri organised the Anganwadi's reading circle from scratch.
Hitesh took gold at the district inter-school running meet.
Farhan took over the Thursday story-circle — our third Star in as many months.
Gauri led our Kho-Kho squad to two golds at the inter-village championship.
Belur closed the quarter on an unbroken 89-day attendance streak.

closer.quote: A village that has decided to show up for each other every single day.

footer.tagline: Thank you for walking with us.
